mapper.update: MERGE /* @SQLID=SUB01-03#Sql001 */ INTO PSITE_T5N_INFO_READ A USING ( SELECT #{req.notificationId} T5N_INFO_ID, #{req.userId} T5N_LOGIN FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.T5N_INFO_ID = TO_NUMBER(B.T5N_INFO_ID) AND A.T5N_LOGIN = B.T5N_LOGIN ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.T5N_READ_FLG = 1, A.T5N_READ_AT = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( T5N_ID, T5N_INFO_ID, T5N_READ_FLG, T5N_READ_AT, T5N_LOGIN ) VALUES ( SEQ_PSITE_T5_INFO_READ.NEXTVAL, #{req.notificationId}, 1, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB01-03#SQL002 */ A.T4N_ID notificationId, A.T4N_TITLE title, A.T4N_CONTENT contents, A.T4N_FILE1 attachDocument1, A.T4N_FILE2 attachDocument2, A.T4N_FILE3 attachDocument3, A.T4N_FILE_COM1 attachDocumentComment1, A.T4N_FILE_COM2 attachDocumentComment2, A.T4N_FILE_COM3 attachDocumentComment3, A.T4N_URL url, A.COR_URL_COM urlComment, A.COR_DISCLAIMER disclaimer FROM PSITE_T4N_INFO A WHERE A.T4N_ID = TO_NUMBER(#{req.notificationId})
